task_description:
# AI Content Generation

Implement AI-powered content generation that creates GEO-optimized content based on brand voice, target keywords, and visibility gaps.

## Rationale
Proactive content creation completes the GEO workflow from monitoring to optimization to generation. Reduces effort for users to improve visibility.

## User Stories
- As a content manager, I want AI-generated content drafts so that I can create more content faster
- As a marketing team, I want GEO-optimized content so that every piece we publish improves visibility

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AI generates content optimized for AI search visibility
- [ ] Content matches brand voice and tone guidelines
- [ ] Targets identified visibility gaps and keywords
- [ ] Multiple format support (blog, FAQ, press release)

patterns.api_route: API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse with try-catch error handling, Zod validation with safeParse(), getOrganizationId() for auth, and standard JSON response format { success, data, error }
patterns.validation: Zod schemas define strict enums for controlled values, use .optional() for optional fields, and safeParse() returns flattened errors for better UX
patterns.ai_claude: Singleton client pattern with getClaudeClient(), REQUIRED max_tokens parameter, optional system field for brand voice, CLAUDE_MODELS constants for model selection
patterns.ai_openai: Singleton client pattern with getOpenAIClient(), system message goes FIRST in messages array, temperature controls creativity (0-2), GPT_MODELS constants
patterns.components: Client components use 'use client' directive, Tailwind classes with cn() utility, lucide-react icons, React.useState for local state, error handling with error state display
patterns.prompts: Comprehensive system prompts with detailed instructions, user prompts built dynamically from input data, JSON response parsing with fallback handling, validation of AI output

existing_implementations.description: Codebase has comprehensive AI infrastructure with both Anthropic Claude and OpenAI clients, existing content management with content type enums, and sophisticated prompt engineering patterns for brand analysis
